intro: Spinoliva ilicifolia, also known as the Hairy Oak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Strasburgeriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases and conditions. The bioactive constituents of Spinoliva ilicifolia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
